MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-28-2013 IN 206, DEFENDANT KSK PROPERTY MANAGEMENT INC'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS GRANTED. THERE SHALL BE NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES OF THE TRIAL DATE BASED ON SCHEDULE CONFLICTS OF COUNSEL. THE NEW TRIAL DATE WILL BE DEEMED TO BE THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE FOR STATUTORY CUT-OFF PURPOSES. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty Jonathan Bornstein of Bornstein & Bornstein (415-810-4832) appearing for cross-complainant Yaw-Jin Hung. No other appearance.

The court adopted it tentative ruling as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT KSK PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.'s DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. 1) Sustained with leave to amend; a) Breach of contract to allege all elements and supportive facts; b) Fraud to allege with particularity. 2) Sustained without leave to amend as to negligence not addressed in opposition. 3) Sustained without leave to amend as to common counts because acknowledges no work by landlord. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Ronald E Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/REQ)
